reason: Verified that the agent successfully uses GitHub tools to fetch authenticated user information and returns the correct GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Clicked on "QA-20260512-222249-s6wq" agent in the sidebar — Agent opened and landing page displayed
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator showed "idle" in the top right header
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted and session "GitHub Username Verification Check" created
Granted GitHub account access when card appeared — Selected existing GitHub account and clicked "Allow Access" button
Allowed GitHub API call "GET /user" — Selected "Allow Once" to permit the authenticated user fetch
Waited for agent response (approximately 1m 25s total) — Agent completed all tool calls and returned response
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took screenshot showing final result — Screenshot captured showing agent status "idle" and complete conversation with GitHub username response
